_comment: Cross-language fingerprint edge case test vectors. Copy to TypeScript repo for parity verification.
_hashing_note: hash_text/hashContent = SHA-256 of NFC-normalized UTF-8 bytes. hash_obj/hashObj = SHA-256 of RFC 8785 canonical JSON bytes. EMPTY_HASH = SHA-256 of empty bytes.

empty_array.note: Empty checks array returns EMPTY_HASH, NOT hash of canonical '[]'

non_empty_4_fields.note: Non-empty checks without enforcement fields: hash 4-field objects

empty_string.note: Empty string is hashed as a value (hash_text('')), which happens to equal EMPTY_HASH since sha256(b'') is the same. The semantic distinction is: None = absent, '' = explicitly empty.

non_empty.note: Non-empty workflow_id: hash_text of the string value

without_enforcement.note: No check has triggered_by → hash only 4 fields per check

with_enforcement.note: Any check has triggered_by → hash 8 fields per check (enforcement fields included)

mixed_enforcement.note: One check has triggered_by → ALL checks use 8-field mode. Missing fields default to null.
